dimensions.name: demo_readiness
dimensions.reason: Offline static demo exists with scenario cards and decision details.

dimensions.name: governance_readiness
dimensions.reason: Human review, kill switch, policy gate, and receipt boundaries are explicit.

dimensions.name: portal_text_readiness
dimensions.reason: Chinese and English portal field drafts are prepared.

dimensions.name: metrics_readiness
dimensions.reason: Technical metrics are translated into judge-facing business meaning.

dimensions.name: compliance_safety
dimensions.reason: Forbidden-claim and execution-keyword checks are expected to remain zero.

dimensions.name: commercial_story
dimensions.reason: Target buyers, pain points, value metrics, and pitch story are drafted.
